What We Do

Four Services That Give You
Control of Your Numbers

Stop making decisions based on gut feel. We build the dashboards and reports that show you exactly what's working — and what isn't.

01
Sales Dashboard
A live view of your revenue, top products, and trends — readable at a glance, every day.
  • Daily, weekly & monthly tracking
  • Top & bottom product ranking
  • Revenue trend charts
  • Category-level breakdowns
02
Inventory Analysis
Know what's running low, what's overstocked, and what's costing you money sitting on shelves.
  • Stock-in vs stock-out tracking
  • Dead stock identification
  • Reorder point alerts
  • Category stock health score
03
Profit Tracking
See where you're actually making money — and where margins are quietly being lost.
  • Gross margin by product
  • Profit per unit analysis
  • Category profitability ranking
  • Month-on-month trends
04
Business Reports
Structured monthly reports you can share with your team, investors, or keep for your own review.
  • Executive summary reports
  • KPI scorecards
  • Strategic recommendations
  • Exportable Excel & PDF formats

Portfolio

Real Dashboards.
Real Results.

Every dashboard below was built from actual business data. Here's the problem we solved, and the result the client saw.

Retail Store Garment & Apparel
Full Business Intelligence Dashboard — Garment Retail Store
Problem
A garment store with 40+ products across 8 categories had no visibility into which ones were actually profitable. The owner was making inventory decisions entirely on gut feel — and losing money quietly.
Solution
Built a complete revenue and profit dashboard breaking down performance by category, product, and margin — with real-time KPI cards, trend lines, and a donut chart showing revenue distribution.
Result
Men Wear (26% of revenue) was identified as underfunded. Outerwear — only 1.5% revenue share — was flagged for strategy review. Total revenue visibility: ₹32.6L across 8 categories.
Get a Similar Dashboard →
Inventory Stock-Out Analysis
Inventory Deep-Dive — Stock-Out Revenue Loss Tracker
Problem
High-demand items were running out regularly, but there was no data showing which SKUs, how often it happened, or how much revenue it was silently costing every week.
Solution
Built a stock-out tracking dashboard showing average stock-out per product, frequency patterns, and a risk-ranked list of the highest-revenue-impact SKUs to fix first.
Result
Men Socks (Pack) revealed an average stock-out of 186 units — the single biggest hidden revenue leak. Restocking priority was corrected within 2 weeks and the problem was measurably reduced.
Get a Similar Dashboard →
Profit Analysis Product Intelligence
Product Profit Intelligence — Which Products Actually Pay You
Problem
The business had high sales volume but unclear profitability per product. Some items sold well but barely covered costs. Others were low-volume but highly profitable — and totally overlooked.
Solution
Built a profit-per-unit dashboard comparing every SKU's real contribution — with margin percentage scatter plots and average sales value rankings to surface the true profit drivers.
Result
Sports Shoes (₹1,900 profit/unit) and Sunglasses were revealed as the highest-margin products. Men Jeans Slim Fit topped average sales value at ₹6,073 — guiding both pricing and stock decisions.
Get a Similar Dashboard →

How It Works

Simple Process. Fast Results.

1
You Share Data
Send us your sales records in any format — Excel, Google Sheets, or even photos of your register.
2
We Clean It
We organise and validate your data, removing errors and making it ready for analysis.
3
We Build
We create your custom dashboard with the KPIs and charts that matter most to your business.
4
We Deliver
You receive your dashboard in 3–5 days with a written summary of the key insights found.
5
We Support
We answer your questions and offer ongoing monthly updates or retainer support if needed.
